Aid Of an arbitration board In
the settlement of differences In
their labor affairs is not wanted
by the Spokane Printing Press
mems union. At their last meet
ing. members of this union went
ON record In opposition to the ar
bitration board recently organized,
having no desire to leave their
troubles to q few men for settle
ment,


Representative printing press
men state that they do not wish II
to be understood that they are op.
posed to the principles OF an ar
filtration Of labor troubles. but that
they want to handle their own
business in their own way. When
they are unable to effect an al
justment Of any dispute among
themselves they wish to be heard
from the floor OF the central labor
union.


Presidents Coates OF the central
